name: @appstrate/github-clone-mcp
description: Single-tool MCP server that downloads a GitHub repository tarball into the agent's shared workspace using the user's OAuth2 access token. Pairs with the @appstrate/github-clone integration package — credentials are env-delivered (GITHUB_TOKEN), the runner attaches the per-run workspace volume via the platform's _meta workspace opt-in, and the agent reads the cloned tree directly from /workspace.
author: Appstrate

tools.name: clone_repo
tools.description: Download a GitHub repository tarball into the shared agent workspace. Uses the OAuth-issued GITHUB_TOKEN. Returns a small JSON receipt (path, files, bytes) — the actual file contents land on disk so they never enter the LLM context.
